completed.summary: Real Polytopia unit stats, costs, per-type HP, Swordsman/Knight, city level bonuses
Tech tree UI, unit gating, AI research, 150 tests
Resource tiles, buildings (Lumber Hut/Mine/Farm/Port), food/population growth
Giant super unit at city level 5, 40HP/5atk/4def
Tribe selection, map types, perfection mode, 152 tests
Healing system: units that skip their turn heal +4 HP in friendly territory, +2 in neutral/enemy
Melee advance: only melee units advance into defender's tile on kill
Binary upgrade choice system: Workshop/Explorer, City Wall/Resources, Population Growth/Border Growth, Park/Super Unit
Verify building costs/effects match GDD §5.5 — all match (Lumber Hut 3⭐, Mine 5⭐, Farm 5⭐, Port 7⭐), added verification tests
Full naval chain: RAFT/SCOUT/RAMMER/BOMBER unit types, water movement, Port embark/disembark, naval upgrades, AI naval pathfinding, 188 tests
Neutral villages: spawn at game start with proximity rules, capture by ending turn on them, becomes level-1 city, AI village targeting, 196 tests
AI heal decision — damaged units (<50% HP) within 2 tiles of friendly city skip turn to heal instead of moving toward enemies
AI tech priority: research unit-unlocking techs first when stars > 10, sorted by unlocked unit attack power; 4 new tests, all 204 passing
Verify starting stars: human 15⭐, AI 10⭐, base 5⭐/t + city production; 5 new tests, all 209 passing
Implement Escape (Rider retreats 1 tile when hit) and Persist (Knight refreshes action on kill) skills; 12 new tests; 221 total passing
